languages.text: "Вы забыли, что такое дисциплина?" {n}Голос арбитра звучит обманчиво спокойно, однако напрягшаяся челюсть выдает раздражение Соломона.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, эти люди попусту тратят время на споры. Призовите их к порядку, или позвольте мне". {n}Глейто издает негромкое утвердительное рычание, почти сливающееся со словами хозяина.{/n}

"Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Rogue Trader, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Вы забыли, что такое дисциплина?" {n}Голос арбитра звучит обманчиво спокойно, однако напрягшаяся челюсть выдает раздражение Соломона.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, эти люди попусту тратят время на споры. Призовите их к порядку, или позвольте мне". {n}Глейто издает негромкое утвердительное рычание, почти сливающееся со словами хозяина.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Lord Captain, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}

"Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Lord Captain, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}

"Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Lord Captain, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}

languages.text: 「規律の意味を忘れてしまったのですか？」{n}アービトレイターの声は偽りの穏やかさだが、緊張した顎は彼の苛立ちを物語る.{/n}「艦長様、この人たち無駄な議論に時間を費やしています。秩序を保たせるか、私に任せてください」{n}グライトは主人の言葉に溶け込むかのような、低い唸り声を発する。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Lord Captain, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「規律の意味を忘れてしまったのですか？」{n}仲裁者の声は偽りの穏やかさだが、緊張した顎は彼の苛立ちを物語る.{/n}「艦長様、この人たち無駄な議論に時間を費やしています。秩序を保たせるか、私に任せてください。」{n}グレイトは主人の言葉に溶け込むかのような、低い唸り声を発する.{/n}

languages.text: “你们难道忘了‘纪律’是什么意思吗？”{n}法务官的声音平静得颇有欺骗性，但其紧绷的下颌却彻底暴露了他内心的愠怒。{/n}“行商浪人，这帮人的争论纯粹是在浪费时间，请您让他们恢复秩序。或者，让我来代劳。”{n}格雷托发出一声低沉的咆哮以示赞同，那动静几乎与它主人的话音融为一体。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Rogue Trader, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “你们难道忘了‘纪律’是什么意思吗？”{n}法务官的声音平静得颇有欺骗性，但其紧绷的下颌却彻底暴露了他内心的愠怒。{/n}“行商浪人，这帮人的争论纯粹是在浪费时间，请您让他们恢复秩序。或者，让我来代劳。”{n}格雷托发出一声低沉的咆哮以示赞同，那动静几乎与它主人的话音融为一体。{/n}

languages.text: «¿Han olvidado el significado de la disciplina?». {n}La voz del Arbitrator es engañosamente tranquila, pero su mandíbula tensa demuestra su irritación.{/n} «Comerciante Independiente, esta gente malgasta el tiempo en discusiones. Contrólelos o lo haré yo». {n}Glaito emite un gruñido suave de afirmación que casi se funde con las palabras de su amo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Rogue Trader, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Han olvidado el significado de la disciplina?». {n}La voz del Arbitrator es engañosamente tranquila, pero su mandíbula tensa demuestra su irritación.{/n} «Comerciante Independiente, esta gente malgasta el tiempo en discusiones. Contrólelos o lo haré yo». {n}Glaito emite un gruñido suave de afirmación que casi se funde con las palabras de su amo.{/n}

languages.text: "Habt Ihr vergessen, was Disziplin bedeutet?" {n}Obwohl die Stimme des Arbitrators täuschend ruhig ist, kann er seine Verärgerung nicht verbergen.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, diese Leute vergeuden ihre Zeit mit Streitereien. Bringt sie zur Räson, oder überlasst das mir." {n}Glaitos zustimmendes Knurren scheint mit den Worten seines Meisters zu verschmelzen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Rogue Trader, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Habt Ihr vergessen, was Disziplin bedeutet?" {n}Obwohl die Stimme des Arbitrators täuschend ruhig ist, kann er seine Verärgerung nicht verbergen.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, diese Leute vergeuden ihre Zeit mit Streitereien. Bringt sie zur Räson, oder überlasst das mir." {n}Glaitos zustimmendes Knurren scheint mit den Worten seines Meisters zu verschmelzen.{/n}

languages.text: « Avez-vous oublié ce qu'est la discipline ? » {n}demande l'arbitrator d'une voix calme, mais sa mâchoire serrée trahit son irritation.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, ces gens nous font perdre notre temps avec leurs querelles. Rappelez-les à l'ordre ou laissez-moi faire. » {n}Glaito pousse un petit grognement d'approbation qui se mêle presque aux paroles de son maître.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Rogue Trader, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Avez-vous oublié ce qu'est la discipline ? » {n}demande l'arbitrator d'une voix calme, mais sa mâchoire serrée trahit son irritation.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, ces gens nous font perdre notre temps avec leurs querelles. Rappelez-les à l'ordre ou laissez-moi faire. » {n}Glaito pousse un petit grognement d'approbation qui se mêle presque aux paroles de son maître.{/n}

languages.text: "Disiplinin anlamını unuttunuz mu?" {n}Yargıcı'nın sesi, aldatıcı bir şekilde sakin. Oysa gergin çenesi, sinirlendiğini ele veriyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, bu insanlar tartışarak zaman kaybediyor. Onları hizaya getirin, isterseniz ben de getiririm." {n}Glaito, efendisinin sözlerine karışan yumuşak, onaylayıcı bir hırıltı çıkarıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Rogue Trader, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}
